data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 527d1b65d14b and implementation commit 19eb28e7f9df are on main. (2) All 2018 tests pass across 138 test files, including the 5 new step-failure rollback tests. (3) TypeScript compiles cleanly. (4) Build succeeds. (5) New test file passes lint. (6) No regressions detected. The test file covers non-zero exit rollback, take-loop failure rollback, max iterations rollback, post-rollback queue state verification, and concurrent abort during rollback.
